---
title: "About"
navbar:
     pinned: false
about:
    template: broadside
---

:::{#hero-heading}

Ligea Alexander is an data analyst with 10+ years experience. She is passionate about utilizing her skills in data analysis, visualization, and storytelling to investigate and illustrate complex social, political, and economic issues.

## Education

Columbia University | New York, NY
Data Journalism (Scholarship Awarded) | 2023

Maryland Institute College of Art | Baltimore, MD
MPS Data Analytics and Visualization | 2020 - 2023

## Experience

Freelance | Data Journalist | 2024 - present

Freelance | Writer | 2023 - present

Center for Employment Opportunities | Data Insights Specialist | 2019 - present

:::
